betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Demon Core§f

§aA contained criticality assembly — dangerous but essential for endgame armor and resources!§f

The §bDemon Core§f is a reference to the infamous real-life "demon core" — a plutonium pit that went critical during a criticality accident. In NTM, the demon core has two states: §bClosed§f and §bSuspended (Open)§f.

§6Variants§f:
§b• §bClosed Demon Core§f (hbm:demon_core_closed) — the safe, contained state
§b• §bSuspended Demon Core§f (hbm:demon_core_open) — the active, dangerous state

§6Uses§f:
§b• §bFau Armor§f — required for crafting Fau armor pieces
§b• §bDNT Nano Suit§f — also requires a demon core for the full set
§b• §bAdvanced Reactor Components§f — used in certain high-tier recipes

§cWarning§f: The suspended demon core is extremely radioactive and dangerous! Handle with full hazmat protection and never leave it unattended. The closed variant is safer but still hazardous.

§eTip§f: You will need multiple demon cores for the endgame armors — at least one for Fau armor and one for the DNT Nano Suit. Keep the core closed until you're ready to use it in a recipe.
